rationale: The citing paper mentions Singh, Hansen, and Gupta (2005) only in the related-literature section as one example of prior factor-structure work that captures cross-category attribute correlations and scalability. The citation helps provide broad background positioning for SKU-level and multicategory modeling, but it is not used in the paper's model development, estimation design, hypothesis logic, or benchmark comparisons. There is no further targeted discussion of this specific paper beyond that brief literature note.
